message.content:
@startuml
participant actor as "teacher"
participant interface as "操作界面"
participant as "studentcourse"
participant as "student"
participant as "experiment"
participant as "experimentscore"
participant as "scoreitem"

actor "teacher" ..> "操作界面"
"操作界面" ..> "studentcourse" : 1 选择学期
"studentcourse" ..> "student" : 2 查询哪些学生选了老师的课
"student" ..> "studentcourse" : 3 请求学生列表
"studentcourse" ..> "student" : 4 返回数据
"操作界面" ..> "experiment" : 5 查询这些课程的实验
"experiment" ..> "experimentscore" : 6 查询实验得分
"experimentscore" ..> "scoreitem" : 7 查询得分
"scoreitem" ..> "experimentscore" : 8 返回
"experimentscore" ..> "experiment" : 9 返回得分
"experiment" ..> "操作界面" : 10 返回得分列表
"操作界面" ..> "teacher" : 11 显示数据

@enduml
